hero.description: Optimize yield & Resource control <1>24/7</1> using <2>AI Deep Learning</2> in Abu Dhabi.
hero.img1_desc: Flow matrix analysis & Positive pressure +15 Pa
hero.img3_desc: Heatmap tracking cover and blocked nozzles
hero.img5_desc: Apply or Reject AI recommendations from Checklist

how.label: Technical System
how.desc: Our vision is to turn real-time data into absolute agricultural efficiency, sustaining life in the harshest climate conditions.
how.s0_desc: Optimal flow matrix and positive pressure management for greenhouses in Abu Dhabi.
how.s0_d0_txt: 3-column temperature & 2-column salinity structure linking Well - Pre-process - Buffer Tank.
how.s0_d1_txt: Maintain positive pressure (ΔP)=+15. Red Alert if below 7 (Door open or fan failed).
how.s0_d2_txt: Integrate external weather forecast with real-time internal sensor data.
how.s1_desc: Real-time 30 fps analysis for 6 Barramundi tanks using Deep Learning models.
how.s1_d0_txt: Track Velocity (0.8 m/s), Trajectory & Density (15 fish/m³) in real-time.
how.s1_d1_txt: Detect "Oxidative stress" or NH₃/NO₂⁻ poisoning before traditional DO sensors flash red.
how.s1_d2_txt: AI auto-counts leftover pellets and adjusts Air-lift for Tank 3 by +15%.
how.s2_desc: Monitor 800 m² of Salicornia using thermal and multispectral cameras to optimize photosynthesis.
how.s2_d0_txt: Pinpoint exact bands and blocked nozzles via clear leaf thermal mapping (28.5°C).
how.s2_d1_txt: 85% Chlorophyll density. Early detection of "micro-climate dead zones" or Nitrate deficits.
how.s2_d2_txt: AI automatically adjusts exhaust fans & nutrient dosage at stressed plant bands.
how.s3_desc: "Life Status Bar" system focusing on the critical metrics of Fish & Plants.
how.s3_d0_txt: Prioritize Oxygen (6.5-8.0 mg/L) and Ammonia (<0.02 mg/L). Level 1 priority alerts.
how.s3_d1_txt: Streaming 2-channel holographic feed (Fish & Plants) with a combined AI Score of 92%.
how.s3_d2_txt: Desert High-Contrast interface helps operators grasp risk statuses in seconds.
how.s4_desc: Transform raw data into precise operational actions using artificial intelligence.
how.s4_d0_txt: Predict DO drops 15-30 minutes in advance for timely interventions.
how.s4_d1_txt: Large "Apply Now" button system optimized for industrial Tablets & gloves.
how.s4_d2_txt: Predictive FCR analysis to alert on wasted feed or biomass stress.
how.s5_desc: Optimize resources 24/7 to maintain system autonomy in the KEZAD area.
how.s5_d0_txt: Balance Solar production & Chiller consumption. Auto-trigger solar panel cleaning.
how.s5_d1_txt: TEC water recovery governance from humidity. Autonomous freshwater for MBBR tank.
how.s5_d2_txt: Turn consumption data into actual fish & plant biomass with ultra-low AI error rates.
